children.name: we-created-the-visual-identity-for-abilka-school---an-educational-space-that-inspires-adults-to-explore-design--illustration--and-creativity-through-intensive-programs-and-hands-on-projects-
children.content: We created the visual identity for Abilka School,  an educational space that inspires adults to explore design, illustration, and creativity through intensive programs and hands-on projects.

children.name: abilka-space-is-a-community--space--prostor---------------
children.content:
Abilka Space is a community. 
Space. Prostor. Пространство.

children.name: we-wish-to-bring-more-opportunities-to-people-to-create--to-learn--to-work-and-to-be-happy-
children.content: We wish to bring more opportunities to people to create, to learn, to work and to be happy.

children.name: abilka-space-is-educational-programs--intensive-lessons-and-practical-exercises-for-adults-in-the-field-of-design--illustration-and-creativity--the-programs-are-practical-and-theoretical-classes--as-well-as-joint-projects--lectures--events-etc
children.content:
Abilka Space is educational programs, 
intensive lessons
and practical exercises for
adults in the field of design,
illustration and creativity.

The programs are practical and theoretical
classes, as well as joint
projects, lectures, events
etc

children.name: we-offer-a-variety-of-classes-which-include--drawings-and-sketches-short-courses-lecture-hall-meetings-with-joint-projects-kids-school-our-guest-masters-with-their-own-programs-events-with-our-friends
children.content:
We offer a variety of classes which include:

drawings and sketches
short courses
lecture hall
meetings with joint projects
kids school 
our guest masters with their own programs
events with our friends

children.name: the-logo-is-inspired-by-children-s-paper-cutting-activities--the-elements-of-the-logo-are-various-familiar-shapes-that-resemble-the-letters-of-abilka-space--emphasizing-the-natural-charm-and-creativity-of-cultural-and-artistic-endeavors-
children.content: The logo is inspired by children's paper-cutting activities. The elements of the logo are various familiar shapes that resemble the letters of Abilka Space, emphasizing the natural charm and creativity of cultural and artistic endeavors.

children.name: thanks-to-the-different-elements-of-the-logo---you-can-create-various-objects-for-the-brand--such-as-icons-or-merch
children.content: thanks to the different elements of the logo,  you can create various objects for the brand, such as icons or merch
